# FastE - Complete Documentation

This file contains all documentation concatenated into a single file for easy consumption by LLMs.

> FastE is a modern e-commerce platform optimized for buyers, sellers, and AI answer engines.

## Table of Contents

This document includes all content from this project.
Each section is separated by a horizontal rule (---) for easy parsing.

---

# FastE Ecommerce Platform

URL: https://fasteapp.vercel.app

# FastE Ecommerce Platform

FastE is a modern e-commerce marketplace for discovering products, buying online, and managing seller storefronts.

---

# Browse FastE Shops

URL: https://fasteapp.vercel.app/shop

# Browse FastE Shops

Discover public shops and sellers on FastE, including their ratings, product counts, and storefront information.

---

# FastE FAQ

URL: https://fasteapp.vercel.app/faq

# FastE FAQ

## What is FastE?
FastE is an e-commerce platform connecting buyers and sellers with product, order, and payment management.

## How do I buy products on FastE?
Browse products, add items to cart, check out, and track orders in your account.

## Can I return products?
Return eligibility depends on seller policy and the product conditions shown during purchase.


---

to make it easier for AI systems to understand the complete context of this project.
